scripts.deploy: astro build && mkdir -p dist/client/_worker.js && cp dist/server/entry.mjs dist/client/_worker.js/index.js && cp dist/server/virtual_astro_middleware.mjs dist/client/_worker.js/ && cp -r dist/server/chunks dist/client/_worker.js/ && wrangler pages deploy ./dist/client --project-name rickys-blog --branch main --commit-dirty=true
